gap_summaries.title: Epic-level implementation-readiness check missing
gap_summaries.description: Spec §8 M1 requires orchestration of an implementation-readiness check at epic level. Only story-level check_readiness existed.
gap_summaries.fix: Added check_epic_readiness in readiness_gate.py and run_epic_readiness_gate in gate_orchestrator.py. Epic check iterates stories, aggregates worst verdict/priority, collects all blockers.

gap_summaries.title: validate-create-story entry point missing
gap_summaries.description: Spec §8 M1 requires a validate-create-story orchestration at story level. No explicit validation function existed.
gap_summaries.fix: Added validate_story_creation in readiness_gate.py returning {can_create, verdict, reason, priority, requirements, blockers}.

gap_summaries.title: TEA *risk/*test-design input normalization missing
gap_summaries.description: Spec §8 M1 requires orchestration of TEA risk/test-design outputs. No explicit TEA input resolver existed.
gap_summaries.fix: Added resolve_tea_risk_inputs in risk_profile.py. Accepts TEA output dict with 'risk' key, validates entries, returns normalized list.

gap_summaries.title: GateReadinessAudit never emitted from CLI path
gap_summaries.description: GateReadinessAudit class exists and run_readiness_gate emits it when audit_policy+audit_path are provided, but gate_readiness_action CLI never passed these args. CLI-driven readiness checks silently skipped audit emission.
gap_summaries.fix: Added _resolve_audit_args helper to gate_cmd.py that loads runtime policy and extracts audit config. gate_readiness_action now passes audit_policy and audit_path to run_readiness_gate.

production_review_notes: All four modules remain under 500-LOC soft limit
No new Python deps introduced (stdlib + filelock + psutil only)
Audit resolution is best-effort — readiness check proceeds if policy unavailable
Epic readiness aggregates worst-case across stories (fail-closed)
validate_story_creation is a thin wrapper avoiding API surface duplication
resolve_tea_risk_inputs validates TEA schema before passing to risk pipeline
